text:
Publications


Nedergaard, Helene Korvenius, Hanne Irene Jensen, Mette Stylsvig, Hanne Tanghus Olsen, Serkan Korkmaz, Thomas Strøm, and Palle Toft. 2020. “Effect of Nonsedation on Cognitive Function in Survivors of Critical Illness.” Critical Care Medicine 48 (12): 1790–98.


Nedergaard, Helene Korvenius, Serkan Korkmaz, Hanne Tanghus Olsen, Hanne Irene Jensen, Thomas Strøm, and Palle Toft. 2022. “Failure of Non-Sedation Strategy in Critically Ill, Mechanically Ventilated Patients-a Retrospective, Post-Hoc Analysis of the NONSEDA Trial.” Journal of Critical Care 68: 66–71.


Olsen, Hanne T, Helene K Nedergaard, Catherine L Hough, Serkan Korkmaz, Hanne I Jensen, Thomas Strøm, and Palle Toft. 2021. “Non-Sedation—Does It Improve Health-Related Quality of Life After Critical Illness? A 3-Month Follow-up Sub-Study of the NONSEDA Trial.” Acta Anaesthesiologica Scandinavica 65 (4): 481–88.


Olsen, Hanne T, Helene K Nedergaard, Thomas Strøm, Jakob Oxlund, Karl-Andre Wian, Lars M Ytrebø, Bjørn A Kroken, et al. 2020. “Nonsedation or Light Sedation in Critically Ill, Mechanically Ventilated Patients.” New England Journal of Medicine 382 (12): 1103–11.


Zwiers, Laura C, Timo B Brakenhoff, Brianna M Goodale, Duco Veen, George S Downward, Vladimir Kovacevic, Andjela Markovic, et al. 2025. “Remote Early Detection of SARS-CoV-2 Infections Using a Wearable-Based Algorithm: Results from the COVID-RED Study, a Prospective Randomised Single-Blinded Crossover Trial.” PloS One 20 (6): e0325116.
